name: DisksAndPartitions
summary: The DisksAndPartitions collector collects information of disks and partitions.

fields.name: disk
fields.description: Numeric index of the physical disk.

fields.name: logical_sector
fields.description: Size of the logical sector in bytes. Note On Windows, only NTFS partitions are supported.

fields.name: physical_sector
fields.description: Size of the physical sector in bytes.

fields.name: virtual_loc
fields.description: Virtual location of the physical device (Linux only).

fields.name: partition
fields.description: Numeric index of the partition on a physical disk.

fields.name: volume
fields.description: Volume of the partition or location where it is mounted.

fields.name: partition_freespace
fields.description: Free space available in the partition.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of physical device. For example, fixed hard disk media, removable disk media (Windows only).

examples.title: Example: Show the models of physical disks connected to device "john-pc"
examples.v2_query: DisksAndPartitions model where HostInfo hostname equals "john-pc"
